creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
> Please map the old version of libfreetype to the new version.
> Then report the resuts here.

> I thought there could/should be some automatism to do that?


Adding a line:
   libfreetype.so.9 libfreetype.so.6
to /etc/libmap.conf does allow opera to start and work properly.


Seems like www/opera is the only port suffering from the change in
print/freetype2 and missing libfreetype.so.9, that can't be fixed
by recompiling it.

Building it in poudriere reports:

===>  Building package for opera-12.16_1
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/gstreamer/plugins/libgstoperamatroska.so 
- shared library libxml2.so.5 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/gstreamer/plugins/libgstoperavp8.so 
- shared library libxml2.so.5 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/liboperagtk2.so 
- shared library libfreetype.so.9 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/liboperakde4.so 
- shared library libkdeui.so.7 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/liboperakde4.so 
- shared library libkio.so.7 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/liboperakde4.so 
- shared library libkdecore.so.7 not found
pkg-static: (opera-12.16_1) 
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera/opera - 
shared library libfreetype.so.9 not found

If the port is unable to fix/automate the update, there should be
instructions in the UPDATING file for a manual intervention.
